name: BMM_GENERIC_TYPE
documentation: Meta-type based on a non-container generic class, e.g. `Packet<Header>`.

generic_parameters.name: generic_parameters
generic_parameters.documentation: Generic parameters of the `_root_type_` in this type specifier. The order must match the order of the owning class's formal generic parameter declarations, and the types may be defined types or formal parameter types.

base_class.name: base_class
base_class.documentation: Defining generic class of this type.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Return the full name of the type including generic parameters, e.g. `DV_INTERVAL<T>`, `TABLE<List<THING>,String>`.

type_signature.name: type_signature
type_signature.documentation: Signature form of the type, which for generics includes generic parameter constrainer types E.g. `Interval<T:Ordered>`.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if `_base_class.is_abstract_` or if any (non-open) parameter type is abstract.

flattened_type_list.name: flattened_type_list
flattened_type_list.documentation: Result is `_base_class.name_` followed by names of all generic parameter type names, which may be open or closed.

is_partially_closed.name: is_partially_closed
is_partially_closed.documentation: Returns True if there is any substituted generic parameter.

effective_base_class.name: effective_base_class
effective_base_class.documentation: Effective underlying class for this type, abstracting away any container type.

is_open.name: is_open
is_open.documentation: True if all generic parameters from ancestor generic types have been substituted in this type.
